title: Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (LSCC) Gains from Industrial and Automotive Recovery
excerpt: ClearBridge Investments, a global equity manager, recently published second-quarter 2026 commentary for its “Small Cap Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter...
content_html:
ClearBridge Investments, a global equity manager, recently published second-quarter 2026 commentary for its "Small Cap Growth Strategy". A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Russell 2000 Growth Index increased by 25.6% in the second quarter, marking its third-best quarterly performance in two decades. The rally was fueled by enthusiasm for AI, strength in biotech, and gains in high-beta, high-momentum stocks, amid rising retail trading activity and narrow leadership in specific themes. Despite a complex macroeconomic backdrop and ongoing debates about the pace and impact of AI infrastructure investments, enthusiasm for generational technology investments remains robust. The Strategy achieved strong absolute returns of over 21% (gross) during the quarter but lagged the Russell 2000 Growth benchmark due to underperformance in certain healthcare and financial stocks, software challenges, and limited exposure to high-beta, high-momentum AI-related stocks. In addition, please check the Strategy's top five holdings to know its best picks in 2026.

In its Q2 2026 investor letter, Clearbridge Small Cap Growth Strategy highlighted Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC). Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) is a semiconductor company that provides low-power field-programmable gate arrays. On July 23, 2026, Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) stock closed at $138.13 per share. One-month return of Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) was -3.07%, and its shares gained 150.05% over the past 52 weeks. Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) has a market capitalization of $18.92 billion.

Clearbridge Small Cap Growth Strategy stated the following regarding Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) in its Q2 2026 investor update:

"Information technology (IT) was another area of relative weakness despite exceptionally strong performance from several holdings across semiconductors and security software. We saw material gains in semiconductor holdings such as Allegro MicroSystems and Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC), both of which benefited from recovery in previously depressed industrial and automotive end markets alongside increasing content gains in newer AI server architectures."

Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 36 hedge fund portfolios held Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) at the end of the first quarter, up from 33 in the previous quarter. While we acknowledge the potential of Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:LSCC) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

content_html_zh:
全球股票管理公司 ClearBridge Investments 最近发布了其“小盘股增长策略”的 2026 年第二季度评论。 该信函的副本可以在此处下载。 罗素 2000 增长指数第二季度增长 25.6%，创下二十年来第三好的季度表现。 此次上涨的推动因素包括对人工智能的热情、生物技术的强势以及高贝塔值、高动量股票的上涨，以及零售交易活动的增加和特定主题的领先优势。 尽管宏观经济背景复杂，而且关于人工智能基础设施投资的速度和影响的争论持续不断，但对新一代技术投资的热情仍然强劲。 该策略在本季度实现了超过 21%（总回报）的强劲绝对回报，但由于某些医疗保健和金融股票表现不佳、软件挑战以及对高贝塔值、高动量人工智能相关股票的敞口有限，落后于罗素 2000 增长基准。 此外，请查看该策略的前五名持股，以了解其 2026 年的最佳选择。

Clearbridge 小盘增长战略在其 2026 年第二季度投资者信中重点关注了莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）。 莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）是一家提供低功耗现场可编程门阵列的半导体公司。 2026 年 7 月 23 日，莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）股票收于每股 138.13 美元。 莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）一个月回报率为-3.07%，其股价在过去52周内上涨了150.05%。 莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）的市值为 189.2 亿美元。

Clearbridge 小盘股增长策略在其 2026 年第二季度投资者更新中对莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）做出了以下陈述：

“尽管半导体和安全软件领域的几家公司表现异常强劲，但信息技术（IT）是另一个相对弱势的领域。 我们看到 Allegro MicroSystems 和 Lattice Semiconductor Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）等半导体持股取得了实质性增长，这两家公司都受益于先前低迷的工业和汽车终端市场的复苏，以及新型人工智能服务器架构中内容收益的增加。”

莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）并未出现在我们的 2026 年对冲基金最受欢迎的 40 只股票名单中。 根据我们的数据库，截至第一季度末，有 36 个对冲基金投资组合持有莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC），高于上一季度的 33 个。 虽然我们承认莱迪思半导体公司（纳斯达克股票代码：LSCC）作为投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。 如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
